name: @relai-fi/spr-demo
description: Two Claude-driven agents settle a private USDC payment over a RelAI Shielded Payment Request on solana-devnet. The SELLER issues an opaque quote, the BUYER pays anonymously through Privacy Pool V4.1, the seller redeems with a separate ZK proof — atomic 95/5 fee split. Each agent loads its own Claude Skill (.claude/skills/relai-spr-{issue,pay,redeem}) at startup and operates against the live RelAI Management API + Solana network.
